type.text: { (arg0: T): void; (value?: T | PromiseLike<T> | undefined): void }

members.name: debounce
members.description:
Returns the same pending promise each time called until interval expires.

When the interval expires, the work promise is executed with the args from the latest call
to debounce. Then all pending promises are resolved with the value from the work promise.

declarations.description: A smart profile picture stack component
declarations.name: TitaniumProfilePictureStack

members.name: people
members.description: Array of people to display in a stack.

members.name: max
members.description: Number to define the max number of people to display in a stack.

members.name: enableDirectoryHref
members.description:
Enable a link to directory for each person visible in the stack.
This will open a new tab to the directory profile of the person.
This will only work if the person has an Id.

members.name: autoResize
members.description: Enable auto resizing of the profile picture stack. Setting this will supersede the max property.

members.name: size
members.description: Size of the profile picture.
